title: add arena_db credentials to korczewski sealed secrets
description:
## Summary
- Adds `arena_db_password` and `arena_db_url` for the `arena_app` role to the korczewski `workspace-secrets` SealedSecret
- Follows PR #711 (arena moved to korczewski) — without these the arena-server pod can't connect to shared-db

## Test plan
- [x] `task env:seal ENV=korczewski` completed cleanly (schema completeness verified)
- [ ] Post-merge: `task arena:deploy ENV=korczewski` bootstraps schema + starts pod
